text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
In my performance class, they said "Don't be 
afraid of the audience. They're like teammates 
who will lift you up."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I understand that, I really do. I'm just no good at being the center of attention… Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If only they could turn the lights down 
so low that no one could see me…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No, sorry. Forget I said anything. 
I have to change…!
